note: 5-year forward PE bands per ticker. Used by tools/valuation.cjs Method 5 (historical band). Source = consensus history from public sites; refresh quarterly. Numbers are draft anchors — analyst confirms.

3037.rationale: Trough at PC-cycle bottom 2023; peak at AI hype 2024. Median 14x reflects long-cycle PC PCB anchor. Currently re-rating toward Japanese peers.

3017.rationale: Liquid cooling premium emerged 2024; pre-AI traded as commodity heat-sink maker.

2308.rationale: Delta's diversified mix smooths the band. AI-power adds upside but EV/auto + industrial weighed in 2023.

2449.rationale: OSAT cyclicality keeps median low. AI-test re-rating only emerging 2025+.

3443.rationale: ASIC design service trades rich on TSMC alignment + customer wins; band is wide due to single-customer dependency risk.
